sentences.arabic: يَصِفُ الْأَدَبُ الْعَرَبِيُّ جَمَالَ الطَّبِيعَةِ بِدِقَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapska književnost precizno opisuje ljepotu prirode.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic literature describes the beauty of nature accurately.

sentences.arabic: يَتَحَدَّثُ الْكَاتِبُ عَنِ الْأَشْجَارِ الْخَضْرَاءِ وَالسَّمَاءِ الصَّافِيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pisac govori o zelenom drveću i vedrom nebu.
sentences.translationEn: The writer talks about green trees and the clear sky.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْأَوْصَافُ تَرْسُمُ لَوْحَةً فَنِّيَّةً فِي عَقْلِ الْقَارِئِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi opisi slikaju umjetničku sliku u umu čitaoca.
sentences.translationEn: These descriptions paint an artistic picture in the reader's mind.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُنَا الْكَلِمَاتُ الرَّقِيقَةُ عَلَى الشُّعُورِ بِالرَّاحَةِ وَالسَّلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Nježne riječi nam pomažu da osjetimo udobnost i mir.
sentences.translationEn: Gentle words help us feel comfort and peace.

sentences.arabic: الطَّبِيعَةُ مَصْدَرٌ دَائِمٌ لِلْإِلْهَامِ فِي الْقِصَصِ وَالْأَشْعَارِ.
sentences.translation: Priroda je stalni izvor inspiracije u pričama i pjesmama.
sentences.translationEn: Nature is a constant source of inspiration in stories and poems.
